user.title: Set up Petkit Water Fountain
user.description: Select a discovered Petkit fountain, or enter its Bluetooth MAC address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Petkit Fountain
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the **{name}** fountain ({address})?

init_device.title: Initialize Device
init_device.description: The device **{name}** needs to be initialized. This will register a secret with the device. **Warning:** After initialization, the PetKit app will no longer be able to connect to this device. You can factory reset the device to restore app access.

error.no_devices_found: No Petkit fountains were found nearby. Enter the MAC address manually.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Make sure it is powered on and in range.
error.device_already_initialized: Device is already initialized. Please factory reset it first (detach control module, hold power button 3 seconds until LEDs flash).
error.init_failed: Failed to initialize the device. Please try again.

abort.device_already_initialized: This device is already initialized with a secret. Please factory reset it first (detach control module, hold power button for 3 seconds until LEDs flash), then try again.
